title: Naj Pandoor
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Criminal |image=[[File:NajPandoor-DitC.jpg]] |name=Naj Pandoor |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=Brown |feathers= |eyes=Brown |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|I didn't set out to be a smuggler…''"
"''I know all the stories. Did you come from a broken home, are you a rebel against an unjust system, or are you earning the fee to buy your sister out of slavery?''"
"''Actually, I was a graduate student in Xenoarchaeology at the University of Ketaris. But when the University went bankrupt, it took my academic career with it. From Xenoarchaeology to smuggling is a more direct route than you might think.''"
"''Especially if you cut Ethics class.''|Naj Pandoor and Jyl Somtay|{{InsiderCite|79|Death in the Catacombs}}}} '''Naj Pandoor''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] freelance [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]]. As a teenager Pandoor was a student of [[Xenoarchaeology/Legends|xenoarchaeology]] at the [[University of Ketaris]]. Soon after the school went bankrupt, he decided to be a smuggler. Pandoor went with [[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] [[Frayne]] and [[Jyl Somtay]] on an expedition to [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]]. {{Char-stub}} ==Appearances== *{{InsiderCite|79|Death in the Catacombs}} {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' [[File:Jylsomtaygeonosis_b.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Jyl Somtay and Pandoor fight back to back on Geonosis]] ==Notes and references== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Naj Pandoor}} {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Naj Pandoor }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Pandoor, Naj}} [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Smugglers]]
